using System;
using System.CodeDom.Compiler;
using System.Linq;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;

namespace TestApp.Mappers;

/// <summary>
/// Source generated mapper from <see cref="global::TestApp.Models.Person"/> to <see cref="global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary"/>.
/// </summary>
partial class PersonSummaryMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary
        {
            Id = source.Id,
            FullName = source.FirstName + " " + source.LastName,
            AddressCount = source.Addresses.Count(),
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Person source, global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.Id = source.Id;
        destination.FullName = source.FirstName + " " + source.LastName;
        destination.AddressCount = source.Addresses.Count();
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Person, global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary
        {
            Id = src.Id,
            FullName = src.FirstName + " " + src.LastName,
            AddressCount = src.Addresses.Count(),
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.PersonSummary> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Person> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
